description: cereggii — four bugs from free-threaded fuzzing
OOM-0035: Abort / malformed str: invalid `maxchar` in `_PyUnicode_FromUCS4` (`unicodeobject.c:2228`)
OOM-0034: Segfault: unchecked `PyUnicode_AsUTF8` NULL deref in `pegen.c:33`
[SUPERSEDED — duplicate of OOM-0036 / python/cpython#151818] OOM-0033: Segfault / negative-refcount: over-decreffed sys.path entry in PyType_IsSubtype (typeobject.c:2931)
OOM-0032: Abort: pending-exception assert from `warn_explicit` normalization (`_warnings.c:799/806`)
OOM-0030: Abort: `Py_DECREF` of NULL-data unicode in `unicode_subtype_new` (`unicodeobject.c:13986`)
[SUPERSEDED — duplicate of OOM-0036 / python/cpython#151818] OOM-0029: Abort: negative refcount on a MemoryError (tuple_dealloc, tupleobject.c:277)
OOM-0026: Abort: err-code vs `PyErr` desync in `handle_channel_error` (`_interpchannelsmodule.c:398` / `:443`)
OOM-0024: Segfault: dealloc of uninitialized iterator in `template_iter` (`templateobject.c:232`)
OOM-0023: Fatal: dealloc clears the in-flight exception in `subtype_dealloc` (`typeobject.c:2719`)
OOM-0021: Fatal: NULL returned without an exception set in `_Py_CheckFunctionResult` (`call.c:43`)
OOM-0017: Abort: negative `gc_refs` ("refcount too small") in `validate_gc_objects` (`gc_free_threading.c:1116`)
OOM-0013: Abort: builtin breaks result/error contract in `_Py_BuiltinCallFastWithKeywords_StackRef` (`ceval.c:843`)
[SUPERSEDED — duplicate of OOM-0008] OOM-0011: Abort: assert(!PyErr_Occurred()) in specialize (specialize.c:364)
OOM-0009: Abort: stale `release1` flag trips an ownership assert in `replace` (`unicodeobject.c:10783`)
OOM-0007: Fatal: `context_tp_dealloc` clears the pending exception (`context.c:535`)
OOM-0006: Abort/Segfault: `_PyObject_GC_UNTRACK` assert on untracked iterator in `dictiter_dealloc` (`dictobject.c:5532`)
[SUPERSEDED — duplicate of OOM-0036 / python/cpython#151818] OOM-0005: Abort: negative-refcount over-decref in `_PyFrame_ClearLocals` (frame.c:101)
OOM-0004: Abort/Segfault: corrupted object freelist in `clear_freelist` (`object.c:909`)
OOM-0001: Segfault: `Py_DECREF` of a NULL `filename` in `do_warn` (`_warnings.c:1139`)

_zoneinfo.c: SEGV in get_weak_cache when ZoneInfo subclass overrides __new__
zlibmodule.c: Missing NULL check on PyErr_NewException during init
weakrefobject.c: WRAP_BINARY ref leak with dead proxy
unicode_format.c: formatfloat wrong return + PY_SSIZE_T_MIN negate UB

termios.c: tcsetwinsize passes NULL to PyLong_AsLong
exceptions.c: SyntaxError.__init__ ref leaks on re-initialization
_struct.c: Segfault and assertion failure on uninitialized Struct object
_ssl.c: Py_DECREF(NULL) crash in SNI callback when SSLObject wrapper is deleted
_sqlite/connection.c: Assertion failure replacing active collation + missing PyErr_NoMemory
socketmodule.c: Reference and buffer leaks via audit hook failures
selectmodule.c: errno < 0 comparison is always false
readline.c: Missing NULL check on PyLong_FromLong in setup_readline
pyexpat.c: Segfault in ExternalEntityParserCreate error path
optimizer_symbols.c: make_bottom NULL deref when arena full
marshal.c: 8 refs leaked on corrupt TYPE_CODE marshal stream
legacy_tracing.c: Unchecked PyLong_AsInt in tracing callbacks
_interpretersmodule.c: SEGV during interpreter creation under OOM
instrumentation.c: PyLong leaked per C API monitoring call
initconfig.c: SET_ITEM macro leaks dict on expression failure
import.c: Wrong interpreter on return + double lock release
hamt.c: sub_node leaked in bitmap_assoc and bitmap_without
frameobject.c: FrameLocalsProxy swallows and overwrites real errors
exceptions.c: BaseExceptionGroup repr OOB access — segfault from 3 lines of Python
_csv.c: _set_str missing NULL check → segfault on OOM
crossinterp.c: Use-after-free + leaked exception + shadowed variable
codegen.c + compile.c + assemble.c: Ref leaks and error handling bugs in compiler
codeobject.c: co_tlbc NULL deref + replacement_locations leak
ceval.c: Missing PyErr_NoMemory in _PyObjectArray_FromStackRefArray + PyEval_GetLocals NULL deref
bltinmodule.c: __lazy_import__ NULL deref without Python frame
ast.c: Missing LEAVE_RECURSIVE on 30 early-return paths
